texto: Should you care to write (and only the saints know why you should) you must needs have knowledge and art and magic - the knowledge of the music of words, the art of being artless, and the magic of loving your readers.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Kahil Gibran sobre temas ligados a sabedoria. A afirmação “Should you care to write (and only the saints know why you should) you must needs have knowledge …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a sabedoria, words, writing, útil em momentos de writing.
